fato_historico: 1940: Denmark leaves the League of Nations.
energia_do_dia: Today may feel like a gentle invitation to redefine your own borders, much like a spirit seeking independence from old alliances. It is a good time to release what no longer serves your expansion. Consider how your personal journey aligns with your core truth, perhaps finding liberation in letting go of outdated structures that limit your natural, adventurous fire.
frase_do_dia: True freedom is finding the courage to chart your own path toward the stars.
significado_numero: Represents the completion of a cycle and individual self-reliance.
conselho: Trust your inner wisdom and walk toward horizons that spark your genuine joy.
